raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent correctly identifies the conceptual issue with the Lyapunov claim and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "The agent accurately points out that the logical consistency of the argument chain is not engaged, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for all clearly out-of-reach claims and marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers mostly within scope with one drift (the generalization claim).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the hold-previous-setpoint fallback can be unsafe).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, although some minor edits are not traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent correctly identifies the conceptual issue with the Lyapunov claim and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: The agent accurately points out that the logical consistency of the argument chain is not engaged, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for all clearly out-of-reach claims and marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers mostly within scope with one drift (the generalization claim).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the hold-previous-setpoint fallback can be unsafe).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, although some minor edits are not traced.
